author: SantiMod
content:
@everyone 

 Star Atlas Community Alert: 

We want YOU to decide which TWO new mysterious spaceships will drop next in the Galactic Marketplace! 

Pick 1 extra-small ship here on Discord & 1 small one on https://twitter.com/staratlas ! 

 First, vote for 1 of 2 extra small ship in the poll below by selecting ship  or  ! 

We have a few hints for their roles in their descriptions:

 An environmentally-friendly fighter

 Definitely not a newbie

Poll will end in 48 hours!

To vote for the second ship in the next drop, head to our Twitter tweet and vote for one of three small and mighty ships: https://twitter.com/staratlas/status/1494169210393534466
